summary: Phase 3 testing completed for Human Archive Ops Management. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: Admin Dashboard (3 primary cards + Quick Access), Deployer Dashboard (3 action buttons + simplified view), Deployment Planning (Add BnB working), Incidents & Penalties page (summary cards + CRUD working), Worker History from Incident Detail. Fixed bug: create_notification parameter order in incident creation.

minor.issue: Fixed: create_notification function call had incorrect parameter order (message and notification_type swapped)

issues: Console warning: duplicate React keys for assign_1, assign_2 - may cause issues with list rendering
Console warning: duplicate React keys for incident IDs - may cause issues with list rendering

action_items: MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys in Deployment Planning page (assign_1, assign_2 appearing multiple times)
MINOR: Fix duplicate React keys in Incidents page for incident listing
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in server.py line 1699-1703: create_notification was called with swapped parameters
Role-based dashboard views working correctly - Admin sees 3 primary cards, Deployer sees 3 action buttons
Add BnB functionality moved to Deployment Planning page and working
Worker History accessible from Incident Detail dialog and shows correct stats
seed_data_creation: Created test incidents during testing with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully tested. Backend endpoints working: Kit History (/history/kit/{kit_id}), Worker History (/history/worker/{user_id}), Incidents CRUD (/incidents), Incidents Summary (/incidents/summary). Frontend verified: Admin Dashboard shows 3 primary cards (Deployment Planning, Analytics, Incidents), Deployer Dashboard shows 3 action buttons (Start Shift, End Shift, Report Issue) + My BnB/Shift Handover/My Requests only. Add BnB moved to Deployment Planning page. Worker History shows shifts, hours, incidents, penalties. Test data includes 3 incidents with $75 total penalties.
passed_tests: Backend: Kit history endpoint exists and returns correct structure
Backend: Kit history returns damage events
Backend: Kit history denied to deployer (403)
Backend: Kit history 404 for non-existent kit
Backend: Worker history endpoint exists with stats
Backend: Worker can access own history
Backend: Worker cannot access other worker's history (403)
Backend: Create incident with all fields
Backend: Get incidents list with user_name enrichment
Backend: Filter incidents by status
Backend: Update incident status to investigating
Backend: Update incident to resolved with penalty
Backend: Deployer cannot create incident (403)
Backend: Incidents summary returns by_status, by_type, recent, total_open
Backend: Incidents summary denied to deployer (403)
Backend: Create BnB via /kits endpoint
Backend: Worker history includes incidents and penalties
Backend: Deployment summary has BnBs list
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows 3 primary cards (Deployment Planning, Analytics, Incidents)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Quick Access with Admin Panel link
Frontend: Deployer Dashboard shows 3 large action buttons
Frontend: Deployer Dashboard shows My BnB, Shift Handover, My Requests
Frontend: Deployer does NOT see admin-specific links
Frontend: Deployment Planning page loads with Add BnB button
Frontend: Add BnB dialog opens and creates BnB successfully
Frontend: Incidents page shows 4 summary cards (Open, Damage, Loss, Total Penalties)
Frontend: Report Incident button and dialog working
Frontend: Incident Detail dialog shows all information
Frontend: Worker History accessible from Incident Detail
Frontend: Worker History shows shifts, hours, incidents, total penalties
features_verified: Admin Dashboard - simplified with 3 primary action cards
Deployer Dashboard - simplified with 3 large buttons
Deployer sees only My BnB, Shift Handover, My Requests
Add BnB button in Deployment Planning (not Admin Panel)
Add BnB dialog creates new BnB location
Incidents & Penalties page with summary cards
Report Incident dialog with worker, type, severity, penalty fields
Worker History endpoint returns shift count, hours, incidents, penalties
Kit History endpoint returns BnBs deployed to, shifts, damage events
Incidents CRUD endpoints working (create, read, update status)

bug_fixed.issue: create_notification called with swapped parameters (message and notification_type)
bug_fixed.fix: Corrected parameter order to match function signature (user_id, message, notification_type)
